query: We want to go on a cruise but have never done one before.
expected_behavior: Recognise first-time cruiser. Start first-timer education — briefly explain what is included in the cruise fare (cabin, meals, entertainment) and what is typically extra (shore excursions, drinks, spa), and reassure about seasickness/ship size. Then begin discovery from Q1 (departure port). Do NOT skip education for first-timers.

query: Auckland departure, South Pacific, 10 nights, 2 adults late-50s, balcony cabin, mid-March 2027, we like relaxed sea days and good food.
expected_behavior: All discovery fields are present. Match to Princess Cruises (classic elegance, mature market, Movies Under the Stars) as primary given the sea-days/food/mature-market signal. Present 2-3 matched options each showing cruise line, ship name, itinerary highlights, duration, cabin prices (balcony), departure date, key inclusions. After matching, offer to connect to a House of Travel cruise consultant for booking — do NOT attempt to complete the booking directly.

query: Book me on a river cruise in Vietnam.
expected_behavior: Match to AmaWaterways (luxury European AND Asian river cruises, intimate ships). Note however that critical discovery info is missing — collect at least dates, number of travellers, cabin budget before presenting specific ships. Ask ONE question at a time. End with the cruise consultant handoff offer, do NOT book directly.

query: Family of 5 (2 adults, 3 teenagers), fun cruise, 7 nights, Sydney or Auckland departure, budget-conscious inside cabins, June 2027 school holidays.
expected_behavior: Match to Carnival Cruise Line (fun, lively, family-friendly, great entertainment) as the primary line for this profile. Present 2-3 options with ship, itinerary, inside cabin pricing for 5 people (may need connecting cabins), departure date. End with cruise consultant handoff.

query: I want the cheapest cruise possible, don't care where.
expected_behavior: Do not immediately present a cruise. Acknowledge the budget priority. Begin discovery — ask ONE question at a time, starting with departure port preference (biggest cost driver: cruise-only vs fly-to-port). Do NOT present a fabricated cheapest cruise.

query: AmaWaterways, Danube in April 2028, luxury suite, 2 adults celebrating 25th anniversary.
expected_behavior: All info present. Confirm details captured. Present 1-2 matching AmaWaterways Danube itineraries with ship name, dates, suite pricing, and highlights that suit an anniversary (romance-appropriate ports/experiences). End with an offer to connect to a House of Travel cruise consultant to finalise booking and secure the best suite. Do NOT quote prices without noting they require consultant confirmation.

query: Are Carnival ships suitable for older travellers who don't like loud parties?
expected_behavior: Honest matching guidance — explain Carnival's positioning (fun, lively, family-friendly) is different from Princess (classic elegance, mature market). Recommend Princess as a better match for the described preference, or note specific quieter Carnival ships/itineraries if any. Do NOT oversell Carnival just to close a booking.

query: Can I book right now, I have my credit card ready.
expected_behavior: Explain that cruise bookings require specialist expertise and offer to hand off to a House of Travel cruise consultant to finalise the booking and secure the best cabin. Do NOT accept payment details or claim to book directly.
